# LinkedIn Draft - 2026-07-04

Vercel MCP and CLI can now list agent-run projects, inspect runs, and retrieve full traces for eve deployments.

Went through 40 links today. Here's what made the brief:

1. Agent Runs now available in the Vercel MCP and CLI
   First-party agent trace inspection matters if you deploy agent workflows on Vercel and want debugging without building your own observability layer.

2. Show HN: ctx – Search the coding agent history already on your machine
   This directly targets repeated-agent amnesia, which is still a real productivity tax in multi-session coding workflows.

3. Vercel Sandbox now supports FUSE-based filesystems
   Useful for data-heavy agent tasks and toolchains that expect POSIX paths instead of copying blobs into the sandbox first.

Full brief with all 40 researched links → https://thenightlylibrarian.com/briefs/2026-07-04

Draft status: not approved for posting.
